title: PickupWidely (Fabric)
description: A server-side mod which increases the radius in which the player can pickup items [1.16.5 - 1.20.1]
body: This mod increases the radius in which a player can pickup dropped items. The mod's config file allows to change the pickup radius (in blocks) to meet your needs. If you have any questions or error reports about the mod, please don't hesitate to contact me through Discord and I will fix it as soon as possible. Note: This idea of the mod is taken from scalar001's forge mod called PickupWidely and I have his permission to use the name and icon for the mod. I haven't tested this mod on all versions so if it doesn't work on some version then PLEASE tell me on discord
